_comment: Copy to data/operator-email.json (gitignored). This is YOUR personal SEND connector: the trusted host sends replies from YOUR address after you approve them (external_contact / approved_connector). It is SEPARATE from the companion's own mailbox (agent-email.json). The worker never receives these credentials. Use a SEND-ONLY app password (SMTP) -- you paste the messages to reply to, so the host never reads your inbox and no IMAP is needed. Set transport to 'mock' for a no-network dry run.
